Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1190: \\n1191:             // TODO(#31581): The steps in the \\\"Revealing the document\\\" section need to be implemented\\n1192:             // `process_pending_input_events` handles the focusing steps as well as other events\\n1193:             // from `Paint`.\\n1194: \\n1195:             // TODO: Should this be broken and to match the specification more closely? For instance see\\n1196:             // https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#flush-autofocus-candidates.\\n1197:             self.process_pending_input_events(*pipeline_id, can_gc);\\n1198: \\n1199:             // > 8. For each doc of docs, run the resize steps for doc. [CSSOMVIEW]\\n1200:             let resized = document.window().run_the_resize_steps(can_gc);\\n1201: \\n1202:             // > 9. For each doc of docs, run the scroll steps for doc.\\n1203:             document.run_the_scroll_steps(can_gc);\\n1204: \\n1205:             // Media queries is only relevant when there are resizing.\\n1206:             if resized {\\n1207:                 // 10. For each doc of docs, evaluate media queries and report changes for doc.\\n1208:                 document\\n1209:                     .window()\\n1210:                     .evaluate_media_queries_and_report_changes(can_gc);\\n1211: \\n1212:                 // https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#img-environment-changes\\n1213:                 // As per the spec, this can be run at any time.\\n1214:                 document.react_to_environment_changes()\\n1215:             }\\n1216: \\n1217:             // > 11. For each doc of docs, update animations and send events for doc, passing\\n1218:             // > in relative high resolution time given frameTimestamp and doc's relevant\\n1219:             // > global object as the timestamp [WEBANIMATIONS]\\n1220:             document.update_animations_and_send_events(can_gc);\\n1221: \\n1222:             // TODO(#31866): Implement \\\"run the fullscreen steps\\\" from\\n1223:             // https://fullscreen.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#run-the-fullscreen-steps.\\n1224: \\n1225:             // TODO(#31868): Implement the \\\"context lost steps\\\" from\\n1226:             // https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#context-lost-steps.\\n1227: \\n1228:             // > 14. For each doc of docs, run the animation frame callbacks for doc, passing\\n1229:             // > in the relative high resolution time given frameTimestamp and doc's\\n1230:             // > relevant global object as the timestamp.\\n1231:             document.run_the_animation_frame_callbacks(can_gc);\\n1232: \\n1233:             // Run the resize observer steps.\\n1234:             let _realm = enter_realm(&*document);\\n1235:             let mut depth = Default::default();\\n1236:             while document.gather_active_resize_observations_at_depth(&depth) {\\n1237:                 // Note: this will reflow the doc.\\n1238:                 depth = document.broadcast_active_resize_observations(can_gc);\\n1239:             }\\n1240: \\n1241:             if document.has_skipped_resize_observations() {\\n1242:                 document.deliver_resize_loop_error_notification(can_gc);\\n1243:                 // Ensure that another turn of the event loop occurs to process\\n1244:                 // the skipped observations.\\n1245:                 document.add_rendering_update_reason(\\n1246:                     RenderingUpdateReason::ResizeObserverStartedObservingTarget,\\n1247:                 );\\n1248:             }\\n1249: \\n1250:             // TODO(#31870): Implement step 17: if the focused area of doc is not a focusable area,\\n1251: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/servo--be6a2f99@dab40a01527870225a72e50a68411f7077f5cb2c/-/blob/components/script/script_thread.rs%3FL1190-1250\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1190: \n1191:             // TODO(#31581): The steps in the \"Revealing the document\" section need to be implemented\n1192:             // `process_pending_input_events` handles the focusing steps as well as other events\n1193:             // from `Paint`.\n1194: \n1195:             // TODO: Should this be broken and to match the specification more closely? For instance see\n1196:             // https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#flush-autofocus-candidates.\n1197:             self.process_pending_input_events(*pipeline_id, can_gc);\n1198: \n1199:             // > 8. For each doc of docs, run the resize steps for doc. [CSSOMVIEW]\n1200:             let resized = document.window().run_the_resize_steps(can_gc);\n1201: \n1202:             // > 9. For each doc of docs, run the scroll steps for doc.\n1203:             document.run_the_scroll_steps(can_gc);\n1204: \n1205:             // Media queries is only relevant when there are resizing.\n1206:             if resized {\n1207:                 // 10. For each doc of docs, evaluate media queries and report changes for doc.\n1208:                 document\n1209:                     .window()\n1210:                     .evaluate_media_queries_and_report_changes(can_gc);\n1211: \n1212:                 // https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#img-environment-changes\n1213:                 // As per the spec, this can be run at any time.\n1214:                 document.react_to_environment_changes()\n1215:             }\n1216: \n1217:             // > 11. For each doc of docs, update animations and send events for doc, passing\n1218:             // > in relative high resolution time given frameTimestamp and doc's relevant\n1219:             // > global object as the timestamp [WEBANIMATIONS]\n1220:             document.update_animations_and_send_events(can_gc);\n1221: \n1222:             // TODO(#31866): Implement \"run the fullscreen steps\" from\n1223:             // https://fullscreen.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#run-the-fullscreen-steps.\n1224: \n1225:             // TODO(#31868): Implement the \"context lost steps\" from\n1226:             // https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#context-lost-steps.\n1227: \n1228:             // > 14. For each doc of docs, run the animation frame callbacks for doc, passing\n1229:             // > in the relative high resolution time given frameTimestamp and doc's\n1230:             // > relevant global object as the timestamp.\n1231:             document.run_the_animation_frame_callbacks(can_gc);\n1232: \n1233:             // Run the resize observer steps.\n1234:             let _realm = enter_realm(&*document);\n1235:             let mut depth = Default::default();\n1236:             while document.gather_active_resize_observations_at_depth(&depth) {\n1237:                 // Note: this will reflow the doc.\n1238:                 depth = document.broadcast_active_resize_observations(can_gc);\n1239:             }\n1240: \n1241:             if document.has_skipped_resize_observations() {\n1242:                 document.deliver_resize_loop_error_notification(can_gc);\n1243:                 // Ensure that another turn of the event loop occurs to process\n1244:                 // the skipped observations.\n1245:                 document.add_rendering_update_reason(\n1246:                     RenderingUpdateReason::ResizeObserverStartedObservingTarget,\n1247:                 );\n1248:             }\n1249: \n1250:             // TODO(#31870): Implement step 17: if the focused area of doc is not a focusable area,\n1251: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/servo--be6a2f99@dab40a01527870225a72e50a68411f7077f5cb2c/-/blob/components/script/script_thread.rs%3FL1190-1250"
  }

  "content": "{\"content\":\"303: \\n304: /// <https://dom.spec.whatwg.org/#document>\\n305: #[dom_struct]\\n306: pub(crate) struct Document {\\n307:     node: Node,\\n308:     document_or_shadow_root: DocumentOrShadowRoot,\\n309:     window: Dom<Window>,\\n310:     implementation: MutNullableDom<DOMImplementation>,\\n311:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \\\"type from external crate\\\"]\\n312:     #[no_trace]\\n313:     content_type: Mime,\\n314:     last_modified: Option<String>,\\n315:     #[no_trace]\\n316:     encoding: Cell<&'static Encoding>,\\n317:     has_browsing_context: bool,\\n318:     is_html_document: bool,\\n319:     #[no_trace]\\n320:     activity: Cell<DocumentActivity>,\\n321:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#the-document%27s-address>\\n322:     #[no_trace]\\n323:     url: DomRefCell<ServoUrl>,\\n324:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-about-base-url>\\n325:     #[no_trace]\\n326:     about_base_url: DomRefCell<Option<ServoUrl>>,\\n327:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \\\"defined in selectors\\\"]\\n328:     #[no_trace]\\n329:     quirks_mode: Cell<QuirksMode>,\\n330:     /// A helper used to process and store data related to input event handling.\\n331:     event_handler: DocumentEventHandler,\\n332:     /// A helper to handle showing and hiding user interface controls in the embedding layer.\\n333:     embedder_controls: DocumentEmbedderControls,\\n334:     /// Caches for the getElement methods. It is safe to use FxHash for these maps\\n335:     /// as Atoms are `string_cache` items that will have the hash computed from a u32.\\n336:     id_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, Vec<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\\n337:     name_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, Vec<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\\n338:     tag_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<LocalName, Dom<HTMLCollection>, FxBuildHasher>>,\\n339:     tagns_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<QualName, Dom<HTMLCollection>, FxBuildHasher>>,\\n340:     classes_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Vec<Atom>, Dom<HTMLCollection>>>,\\n341:     images: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\\n342:     embeds: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\\n343:     links: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\\n344:     forms: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\\n345:     scripts: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\\n346:     anchors: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\\n347:     applets: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\\n348:     /// Information about the `<iframes>` in this [`Document`].\\n349:     iframes: RefCell<IFrameCollection>,\\n350:     /// Lock use for style attributes and author-origin stylesheet objects in this document.\\n351:     /// Can be acquired once for accessing many objects.\\n352:     #[no_trace]\\n353:     style_shared_lock: StyleSharedRwLock,\\n354:     /// List of stylesheets associated with nodes in this document. |None| if the list needs to be refreshed.\\n355:     #[custom_trace]\\n356:     stylesheets: DomRefCell<DocumentStylesheetSet<ServoStylesheetInDocument>>,\\n357:     stylesheet_list: MutNullableDom<StyleSheetList>,\\n358:     ready_state: Cell<DocumentReadyState>,\\n359:     /// Whether the DOMContentLoaded event has already been dispatched.\\n360:     domcontentloaded_dispatched: Cell<bool>,\\n361:     /// The state of this document's focus transaction.\\n362:     focus_transaction: DomRefCell<Option<FocusTransaction>>,\\n363:     /// The element that currently has the document focus context.\\n364:     focused: MutNullableDom<Element>,\\n365:     /// The last sequence number sent to the constellation.\\n366:     #[no_trace]\\n367:     focus_sequence: Cell<FocusSequenceNumber>,\\n368:     /// Indicates whether the container is included in the top-level browsing\\n369:     /// context's focus chain (not considering system focus). Permanently `true`\\n370:     /// for a top-level document.\\n371:     has_focus: Cell<bool>,\\n372:     /// The script element that is currently executing.\\n373:     current_script: MutNullableDom<HTMLScriptElement>,\\n374:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#pending-parsing-blocking-script>\\n375:     pending_parsing_blocking_script: DomRefCell<Option<PendingScript>>,\\n376:     /// Number of stylesheets that block executing the next parser-inserted script\\n377:     script_blocking_stylesheets_count: Cell<u32>,\\n378:     /// Number of elements that block the rendering of the page.\\n379:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#implicitly-potentially-render-blocking>\\n380:     render_blocking_element_count: Cell<u32>,\\n381:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-scripts-that-will-execute-when-the-document-has-finished-parsing>\\n382:     deferred_scripts: PendingInOrderScriptVec,\\n383:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-scripts-that-will-execute-in-order-as-soon-as-possible>\\n384:     asap_in_order_scripts_list: PendingInOrderScriptVec,\\n385:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#set-of-scripts-that-will-execute-as-soon-as-possible>\\n386:     asap_scripts_set: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLScriptElement>>>,\\n387:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#animation-frame-callback-identifier>\\n388:     /// Current identifier of animation frame callback\\n389:     animation_frame_ident: Cell<u32>,\\n390:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-animation-frame-callbacks>\\n391:     /// List of animation frame callbacks\\n392:     animation_frame_list: DomRefCell<VecDeque<(u32, Option<AnimationFrameCallback>)>>,\\n393:     /// Whether we're in the process of running animation callbacks.\\n394:     ///\\n395:     /// Tracking this is not necessary for correctness. Instead, it is an optimization to avoid\\n396:     /// sending needless `ChangeRunningAnimationsState` messages to `Paint`.\\n397:     running_animation_callbacks: Cell<bool>,\\n398:     /// Tracks all outstanding loads related to this document.\\n399:     loader: DomRefCell<DocumentLoader>,\\n400:     /// The current active HTML parser, to allow resuming after interruptions.\\n401:     current_parser: MutNullableDom<ServoParser>,\\n402:     /// The cached first `base` element with an `href` attribute.\\n403:     base_element: MutNullableDom<HTMLBaseElement>,\\n404:     /// This field is set to the document itself for inert documents.\\n405:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#appropriate-template-contents-owner-document>\\n406:     appropriate_template_contents_owner_document: MutNullableDom<Document>,\\n407:     /// Information on elements needing restyle to ship over to layout when the\\n408:     /// time comes.\\n409:     pending_restyles: DomRefCell<FxHashMap<Dom<Element>, NoTrace<PendingRestyle>>>,\\n410:     /// A collection of reasons that the [`Document`] needs to be restyled at the next\\n411:     /// opportunity for a reflow. If this is empty, then the [`Document`] does not need to\\n412:     /// be restyled.\\n413:     #[no_trace]\\n414:     needs_restyle: Cell<RestyleReason>,\\n415:     /// Navigation Timing properties:\\n416:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/navigation-timing/#sec-PerformanceNavigationTiming>\\n417:     #[no_trace]\\n418:     dom_interactive: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n419:     #[no_trace]\\n420:     dom_content_loaded_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n421:     #[no_trace]\\n422:     dom_content_loaded_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n423:     #[no_trace]\\n424:     dom_complete: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n425:     #[no_trace]\\n426:     top_level_dom_complete: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n427:     #[no_trace]\\n428:     load_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n429:     #[no_trace]\\n430:     load_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n431:     #[no_trace]\\n432:     unload_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n433:     #[no_trace]\\n434:     unload_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\\n435:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-https-state>\\n436:     #[no_trace]\\n437:     https_state: Cell<HttpsState>,\\n438:     /// The document's origin.\\n439:     #[no_trace]\\n440:     origin: MutableOrigin,\\n441:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#dom-document-referrer>\\n442:     referrer: Option<String>,\\n443:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#target-element>\\n444:     target_element: MutNullableDom<Element>,\\n445:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-policy-container>\\n446:     #[no_trace]\\n447:     policy_container: DomRefCell<PolicyContainer>,\\n448:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#map-of-preloaded-resources>\\n449:     #[no_trace]\\n450:     preloaded_resources: DomRefCell<PreloadedResources>,\\n451:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#ignore-destructive-writes-counter>\\n452:     ignore_destructive_writes_counter: Cell<u32>,\\n453:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#ignore-opens-during-unload-counter>\\n454:     ignore_opens_during_unload_counter: Cell<u32>,\\n455:     /// The number of spurious `requestAnimationFrame()` requests we've received.\\n456:     ///\\n457:     /// A rAF request is considered spurious if nothing was actually reflowed.\\n458:     spurious_animation_frames: Cell<u8>,\\n459: \\n460:     /// Track the total number of elements in this DOM's tree.\\n461:     /// This is sent to layout every time a reflow is done;\\n462:     /// layout uses this to determine if the gains from parallel layout will be worth the overhead.\\n463:     ///\\n464:     /// See also: <https://github.com/servo/servo/issues/10110>\\n465:     dom_count: Cell<u32>,\\n466:     /// Entry node for fullscreen.\\n467:     fullscreen_element: MutNullableDom<Element>,\\n468:     /// Map from ID to set of form control elements that have that ID as\\n469:     /// their 'form' content attribute. Used to reset form controls\\n470:     /// whenever any element with the same ID as the form attribute\\n471:     /// is inserted or removed from the document.\\n472:     /// See <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#form-owner>\\n473:     /// It is safe to use FxBuildHasher here as Atoms are in the string_cache\\n474:     form_id_listener_map:\\n475:         DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, HashSet<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\\n476:     #[no_trace]\\n477:     interactive_time: DomRefCell<ProgressiveWebMetrics>,\\n478:     #[no_trace]\\n479:     tti_window: DomRefCell<InteractiveWindow>,\\n480:     /// RAII canceller for Fetch\\n481:     canceller: FetchCanceller,\\n482:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#throw-on-dynamic-markup-insertion-counter>\\n483:     throw_on_dynamic_markup_insertion_counter: Cell<u64>,\\n484:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#page-showing>\\n485:     page_showing: Cell<bool>,\\n486:     /// Whether the document is salvageable.\\n487:     salvageable: Cell<bool>,\\n488:     /// Whether the document was aborted with an active parser\\n489:     active_parser_was_aborted: Cell<bool>,\\n490:     /// Whether the unload event has already been fired.\\n491:     fired_unload: Cell<bool>,\\n492:     /// List of responsive images\\n493:     responsive_images: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLImageElement>>>,\\n494:     /// Number of redirects for the document load\\n495:     redirect_count: Cell<u16>,\\n496:     /// Number of outstanding requests to prevent JS or layout from running.\\n497:     script_and_layout_blockers: Cell<u32>,\\n498:     /// List of tasks to execute as soon as last script/layout blocker is removed.\\n499:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \\\"Measuring trait objects is hard\\\"]\\n500:     delayed_tasks: DomRefCell<Vec<Box<dyn NonSendTaskBox>>>,\\n501:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#completely-loaded>\\n502:     completely_loaded: Cell<bool>,\\n503:     /// Set of shadow roots connected to the document tree.\\n504:     shadow_roots: DomRefCell<HashSet<Dom<ShadowRoot>>>,\\n505:     /// Whether any of the shadow roots need the stylesheets flushed.\\n506:     shadow_roots_styles_changed: Cell<bool>,\\n507:     /// List of registered media controls.\\n508:     /// We need to keep this list to allow the media controls to\\n509:     /// access the \\\"privileged\\\" document.servoGetMediaControls(id) API,\\n510:     /// where `id` needs to match any of the registered ShadowRoots\\n511:     /// hosting the media controls UI.\\n512:     media_controls: DomRefCell<HashMap<String, Dom<ShadowRoot>>>,\\n513:     /// A set of dirty HTML canvas elements that need their WebRender images updated the\\n514:     /// next time the rendering is updated.\\n515:     dirty_canvases: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLCanvasElement>>>,\\n516:     /// Whether or not animated images need to have their contents updated.\\n517:     has_pending_animated_image_update: Cell<bool>,\\n518:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/slection-api/#dfn-selection>\\n519:     selection: MutNullableDom<Selection>,\\n520:     /// A timeline for animations which is used for synchronizing animations.\\n521:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/web-animations/#timeline>\\n522:     animation_timeline: DomRefCell<AnimationTimeline>,\\n523:     /// Animations for this Document\\n524:     animations: Animations,\\n525:     /// Image Animation Manager for this Document\\n526:     image_animation_manager: DomRefCell<ImageAnimationManager>,\\n527:     /// The nearest inclusive ancestors to all the nodes that require a restyle.\\n528:     dirty_root: MutNullableDom<Element>,\\n529:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#will-declaratively-refresh>\\n530:     declarative_refresh: DomRefCell<Option<DeclarativeRefresh>>,\\n531:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/resize-observer/#dom-document-resizeobservers-slot>\\n532:     ///\\n533:     /// Note: we are storing, but never removing, resize observers.\\n534:     /// The lifetime of resize observers is specified at\\n535:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/resize-observer/#lifetime>.\\n536:     /// But implementing it comes with known problems:\\n537:     /// - <https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1596992>\\n538:     /// - <https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/4518>\\n539:     resize_observers: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<ResizeObserver>>>,\\n540:     /// The set of all fonts loaded by this document.\\n541:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-font-loading/#font-face-source>\\n542:     fonts: MutNullableDom<FontFaceSet>,\\n543:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#visibility-state>\\n544:     visibility_state: Cell<DocumentVisibilityState>,\\n545:     /// <https://www.iana.org/assignments/http-status-codes/http-status-codes.xhtml>\\n546:     status_code: Option<u16>,\\n547:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#is-initial-about:blank>\\n548:     is_initial_about_blank: Cell<bool>,\\n549:     /// <https://dom.spec.whatwg.org/#document-allow-declarative-shadow-roots>\\n550:     allow_declarative_shadow_roots: Cell<bool>,\\n551: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/servo--be6a2f99@dab40a01527870225a72e50a68411f7077f5cb2c/-/blob/components/script/dom/document.rs%3FL303-550\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "303: \n304: /// <https://dom.spec.whatwg.org/#document>\n305: #[dom_struct]\n306: pub(crate) struct Document {\n307:     node: Node,\n308:     document_or_shadow_root: DocumentOrShadowRoot,\n309:     window: Dom<Window>,\n310:     implementation: MutNullableDom<DOMImplementation>,\n311:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"type from external crate\"]\n312:     #[no_trace]\n313:     content_type: Mime,\n314:     last_modified: Option<String>,\n315:     #[no_trace]\n316:     encoding: Cell<&'static Encoding>,\n317:     has_browsing_context: bool,\n318:     is_html_document: bool,\n319:     #[no_trace]\n320:     activity: Cell<DocumentActivity>,\n321:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#the-document%27s-address>\n322:     #[no_trace]\n323:     url: DomRefCell<ServoUrl>,\n324:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-about-base-url>\n325:     #[no_trace]\n326:     about_base_url: DomRefCell<Option<ServoUrl>>,\n327:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"defined in selectors\"]\n328:     #[no_trace]\n329:     quirks_mode: Cell<QuirksMode>,\n330:     /// A helper used to process and store data related to input event handling.\n331:     event_handler: DocumentEventHandler,\n332:     /// A helper to handle showing and hiding user interface controls in the embedding layer.\n333:     embedder_controls: DocumentEmbedderControls,\n334:     /// Caches for the getElement methods. It is safe to use FxHash for these maps\n335:     /// as Atoms are `string_cache` items that will have the hash computed from a u32.\n336:     id_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, Vec<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n337:     name_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, Vec<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n338:     tag_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<LocalName, Dom<HTMLCollection>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n339:     tagns_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<QualName, Dom<HTMLCollection>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n340:     classes_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Vec<Atom>, Dom<HTMLCollection>>>,\n341:     images: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n342:     embeds: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n343:     links: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n344:     forms: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n345:     scripts: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n346:     anchors: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n347:     applets: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n348:     /// Information about the `<iframes>` in this [`Document`].\n349:     iframes: RefCell<IFrameCollection>,\n350:     /// Lock use for style attributes and author-origin stylesheet objects in this document.\n351:     /// Can be acquired once for accessing many objects.\n352:     #[no_trace]\n353:     style_shared_lock: StyleSharedRwLock,\n354:     /// List of stylesheets associated with nodes in this document. |None| if the list needs to be refreshed.\n355:     #[custom_trace]\n356:     stylesheets: DomRefCell<DocumentStylesheetSet<ServoStylesheetInDocument>>,\n357:     stylesheet_list: MutNullableDom<StyleSheetList>,\n358:     ready_state: Cell<DocumentReadyState>,\n359:     /// Whether the DOMContentLoaded event has already been dispatched.\n360:     domcontentloaded_dispatched: Cell<bool>,\n361:     /// The state of this document's focus transaction.\n362:     focus_transaction: DomRefCell<Option<FocusTransaction>>,\n363:     /// The element that currently has the document focus context.\n364:     focused: MutNullableDom<Element>,\n365:     /// The last sequence number sent to the constellation.\n366:     #[no_trace]\n367:     focus_sequence: Cell<FocusSequenceNumber>,\n368:     /// Indicates whether the container is included in the top-level browsing\n369:     /// context's focus chain (not considering system focus). Permanently `true`\n370:     /// for a top-level document.\n371:     has_focus: Cell<bool>,\n372:     /// The script element that is currently executing.\n373:     current_script: MutNullableDom<HTMLScriptElement>,\n374:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#pending-parsing-blocking-script>\n375:     pending_parsing_blocking_script: DomRefCell<Option<PendingScript>>,\n376:     /// Number of stylesheets that block executing the next parser-inserted script\n377:     script_blocking_stylesheets_count: Cell<u32>,\n378:     /// Number of elements that block the rendering of the page.\n379:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#implicitly-potentially-render-blocking>\n380:     render_blocking_element_count: Cell<u32>,\n381:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-scripts-that-will-execute-when-the-document-has-finished-parsing>\n382:     deferred_scripts: PendingInOrderScriptVec,\n383:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-scripts-that-will-execute-in-order-as-soon-as-possible>\n384:     asap_in_order_scripts_list: PendingInOrderScriptVec,\n385:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#set-of-scripts-that-will-execute-as-soon-as-possible>\n386:     asap_scripts_set: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLScriptElement>>>,\n387:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#animation-frame-callback-identifier>\n388:     /// Current identifier of animation frame callback\n389:     animation_frame_ident: Cell<u32>,\n390:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-animation-frame-callbacks>\n391:     /// List of animation frame callbacks\n392:     animation_frame_list: DomRefCell<VecDeque<(u32, Option<AnimationFrameCallback>)>>,\n393:     /// Whether we're in the process of running animation callbacks.\n394:     ///\n395:     /// Tracking this is not necessary for correctness. Instead, it is an optimization to avoid\n396:     /// sending needless `ChangeRunningAnimationsState` messages to `Paint`.\n397:     running_animation_callbacks: Cell<bool>,\n398:     /// Tracks all outstanding loads related to this document.\n399:     loader: DomRefCell<DocumentLoader>,\n400:     /// The current active HTML parser, to allow resuming after interruptions.\n401:     current_parser: MutNullableDom<ServoParser>,\n402:     /// The cached first `base` element with an `href` attribute.\n403:     base_element: MutNullableDom<HTMLBaseElement>,\n404:     /// This field is set to the document itself for inert documents.\n405:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#appropriate-template-contents-owner-document>\n406:     appropriate_template_contents_owner_document: MutNullableDom<Document>,\n407:     /// Information on elements needing restyle to ship over to layout when the\n408:     /// time comes.\n409:     pending_restyles: DomRefCell<FxHashMap<Dom<Element>, NoTrace<PendingRestyle>>>,\n410:     /// A collection of reasons that the [`Document`] needs to be restyled at the next\n411:     /// opportunity for a reflow. If this is empty, then the [`Document`] does not need to\n412:     /// be restyled.\n413:     #[no_trace]\n414:     needs_restyle: Cell<RestyleReason>,\n415:     /// Navigation Timing properties:\n416:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/navigation-timing/#sec-PerformanceNavigationTiming>\n417:     #[no_trace]\n418:     dom_interactive: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n419:     #[no_trace]\n420:     dom_content_loaded_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n421:     #[no_trace]\n422:     dom_content_loaded_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n423:     #[no_trace]\n424:     dom_complete: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n425:     #[no_trace]\n426:     top_level_dom_complete: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n427:     #[no_trace]\n428:     load_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n429:     #[no_trace]\n430:     load_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n431:     #[no_trace]\n432:     unload_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n433:     #[no_trace]\n434:     unload_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n435:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-https-state>\n436:     #[no_trace]\n437:     https_state: Cell<HttpsState>,\n438:     /// The document's origin.\n439:     #[no_trace]\n440:     origin: MutableOrigin,\n441:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#dom-document-referrer>\n442:     referrer: Option<String>,\n443:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#target-element>\n444:     target_element: MutNullableDom<Element>,\n445:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-policy-container>\n446:     #[no_trace]\n447:     policy_container: DomRefCell<PolicyContainer>,\n448:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#map-of-preloaded-resources>\n449:     #[no_trace]\n450:     preloaded_resources: DomRefCell<PreloadedResources>,\n451:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#ignore-destructive-writes-counter>\n452:     ignore_destructive_writes_counter: Cell<u32>,\n453:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#ignore-opens-during-unload-counter>\n454:     ignore_opens_during_unload_counter: Cell<u32>,\n455:     /// The number of spurious `requestAnimationFrame()` requests we've received.\n456:     ///\n457:     /// A rAF request is considered spurious if nothing was actually reflowed.\n458:     spurious_animation_frames: Cell<u8>,\n459: \n460:     /// Track the total number of elements in this DOM's tree.\n461:     /// This is sent to layout every time a reflow is done;\n462:     /// layout uses this to determine if the gains from parallel layout will be worth the overhead.\n463:     ///\n464:     /// See also: <https://github.com/servo/servo/issues/10110>\n465:     dom_count: Cell<u32>,\n466:     /// Entry node for fullscreen.\n467:     fullscreen_element: MutNullableDom<Element>,\n468:     /// Map from ID to set of form control elements that have that ID as\n469:     /// their 'form' content attribute. Used to reset form controls\n470:     /// whenever any element with the same ID as the form attribute\n471:     /// is inserted or removed from the document.\n472:     /// See <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#form-owner>\n473:     /// It is safe to use FxBuildHasher here as Atoms are in the string_cache\n474:     form_id_listener_map:\n475:         DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, HashSet<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n476:     #[no_trace]\n477:     interactive_time: DomRefCell<ProgressiveWebMetrics>,\n478:     #[no_trace]\n479:     tti_window: DomRefCell<InteractiveWindow>,\n480:     /// RAII canceller for Fetch\n481:     canceller: FetchCanceller,\n482:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#throw-on-dynamic-markup-insertion-counter>\n483:     throw_on_dynamic_markup_insertion_counter: Cell<u64>,\n484:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#page-showing>\n485:     page_showing: Cell<bool>,\n486:     /// Whether the document is salvageable.\n487:     salvageable: Cell<bool>,\n488:     /// Whether the document was aborted with an active parser\n489:     active_parser_was_aborted: Cell<bool>,\n490:     /// Whether the unload event has already been fired.\n491:     fired_unload: Cell<bool>,\n492:     /// List of responsive images\n493:     responsive_images: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLImageElement>>>,\n494:     /// Number of redirects for the document load\n495:     redirect_count: Cell<u16>,\n496:     /// Number of outstanding requests to prevent JS or layout from running.\n497:     script_and_layout_blockers: Cell<u32>,\n498:     /// List of tasks to execute as soon as last script/layout blocker is removed.\n499:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Measuring trait objects is hard\"]\n500:     delayed_tasks: DomRefCell<Vec<Box<dyn NonSendTaskBox>>>,\n501:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#completely-loaded>\n502:     completely_loaded: Cell<bool>,\n503:     /// Set of shadow roots connected to the document tree.\n504:     shadow_roots: DomRefCell<HashSet<Dom<ShadowRoot>>>,\n505:     /// Whether any of the shadow roots need the stylesheets flushed.\n506:     shadow_roots_styles_changed: Cell<bool>,\n507:     /// List of registered media controls.\n508:     /// We need to keep this list to allow the media controls to\n509:     /// access the \"privileged\" document.servoGetMediaControls(id) API,\n510:     /// where `id` needs to match any of the registered ShadowRoots\n511:     /// hosting the media controls UI.\n512:     media_controls: DomRefCell<HashMap<String, Dom<ShadowRoot>>>,\n513:     /// A set of dirty HTML canvas elements that need their WebRender images updated the\n514:     /// next time the rendering is updated.\n515:     dirty_canvases: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLCanvasElement>>>,\n516:     /// Whether or not animated images need to have their contents updated.\n517:     has_pending_animated_image_update: Cell<bool>,\n518:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/slection-api/#dfn-selection>\n519:     selection: MutNullableDom<Selection>,\n520:     /// A timeline for animations which is used for synchronizing animations.\n521:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/web-animations/#timeline>\n522:     animation_timeline: DomRefCell<AnimationTimeline>,\n523:     /// Animations for this Document\n524:     animations: Animations,\n525:     /// Image Animation Manager for this Document\n526:     image_animation_manager: DomRefCell<ImageAnimationManager>,\n527:     /// The nearest inclusive ancestors to all the nodes that require a restyle.\n528:     dirty_root: MutNullableDom<Element>,\n529: <https://drafts.csswg.org/resize-observer/#dom-document-resizeobservers-slot>\n532:     ///\n533:     /// Note: we are storing, but never removing, resize observers.\n534:     /// The lifetime of resize observers is specified at\n535:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/resize-observer/#lifetime>.\n536:     /// But implementing it comes with known problems:\n537:     /// - <https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1596992>\n538:     /// - <https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/4518>\n539:     resize_observers: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<ResizeObserver>>>,\n540:     /// The set of all fonts loaded by this document.\n541:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-font-loading/#font-face-source>\n542:     fonts: MutNullableDom<FontFaceSet>,\n543:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#visibility-state>\n544:     visibility_state: Cell<DocumentVisibilityState>,\n545:     ///   "content": "{\"content\":\"550:     allow_declarative_shadow_roots: Cell<bool>,\\n551:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-upgrade-insecure-requests/#insecure-requests-policy>\\n552:     #[no_trace]\\n553:     inherited_insecure_requests_policy: Cell<Option<InsecureRequestsPolicy>>,\\n554:     //// <https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-mixed-content/#categorize-settings-object>\\n555:     has_trustworthy_ancestor_origin: Cell<bool>,\\n556:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/IntersectionObserver/#document-intersectionobservertaskqueued>\\n557:     intersection_observer_task_queued: Cell<bool>,\\n558:     /// Active intersection observers that should be processed by this document in\\n559:     /// the update intersection observation steps.\\n560:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/IntersectionObserver/#run-the-update-intersection-observations-steps>\\n561:     /// > Let observer list be a list of all IntersectionObservers whose root is in the DOM tree of document.\\n562:     /// > For the top-level browsing context, this includes implicit root observers.\\n563:     ///\\n564:     /// Details of which document that should process an observers is discussed further at\\n565:     /// <https://github.com/w3c/IntersectionObserver/issues/525>.\\n566:     ///\\n567:     /// The lifetime of an intersection observer is specified at\\n568:     /// <https://github.com/w3c/IntersectionObserver/issues/525>.\\n569:     intersection_observers: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<IntersectionObserver>>>,\\n570:     /// The node that is currently highlighted by the devtools\\n571:     highlighted_dom_node: MutNullableDom<Node>,\\n572:     /// The constructed stylesheet that is adopted by this [Document].\\n573:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-documentorshadowroot-adoptedstylesheets>\\n574:     adopted_stylesheets: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<CSSStyleSheet>>>,\\n575:     /// Cached frozen array of [`Self::adopted_stylesheets`]\\n576:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \\\"mozjs\\\"]\\n577:     adopted_stylesheets_frozen_types: CachedFrozenArray,\\n578:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom-view/#document-pending-scroll-event-targets>\\n579:     pending_scroll_event_targets: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<EventTarget>>>,\\n580:     /// Other reasons that a rendering update might be required for this [`Document`].\\n581:     rendering_update_reasons: Cell<RenderingUpdateReason>,\\n582:     /// Whether or not this [`Document`] is waiting on canvas image updates. If it is\\n583:     /// waiting it will not do any new layout until the canvas images are up-to-date in\\n584:     /// the renderer.\\n585:     waiting_on_canvas_image_updates: Cell<bool>,\\n586:     /// The current rendering epoch, which is used to track updates in the renderer.\\n587:     ///\\n588:     ///   - Every display list update also advances the Epoch, so that the renderer knows\\n589:     ///     when a particular display list is ready in order to take a screenshot.\\n590:     ///   - Canvas image updates happen asynchronously and are tagged with this Epoch. Until\\n591:     ///     those asynchronous updates are complete, the `Document` will not perform any\\n592:     ///     more rendering updates.\\n593:     #[no_trace]\\n594:     current_rendering_epoch: Cell<Epoch>,\\n595:     /// The global custom element reaction stack for this script thread.\\n596:     #[conditional_malloc_size_of]\\n597:     custom_element_reaction_stack: Rc<CustomElementReactionStack>,\\n598:     #[no_trace]\\n599:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#active-sandboxing-flag-set>,\\n600:     active_sandboxing_flag_set: Cell<SandboxingFlagSet>,\\n601:     #[no_trace]\\n602:     /// The [`SandboxingFlagSet`] use to create the browsing context for this [`Document`].\\n603:     /// These are cached here as they cannot always be retrieved readily if the owner of\\n604:     /// browsing context (either `<iframe>` or popup) might be in a different `ScriptThread`.\\n605:     ///\\n606:     /// See\\n607:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#determining-the-creation-sandboxing-flags>.\\n608:     creation_sandboxing_flag_set: Cell<SandboxingFlagSet>,\\n609:     /// The cached favicon for that document.\\n610:     #[no_trace]\\n611:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \\\"TODO: unimplemented on Image\\\"]\\n612:     favicon: RefCell<Option<Image>>,\\n613: \\n614:     /// All websockets created that are associated with this document.\\n615:     websockets: DOMTracker<WebSocket>,\\n616: \\n617:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#details-name-group>\\n618:     details_name_groups: DomRefCell<Option<DetailsNameGroups>>,\\n619: \\n620:     /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#registerprotocolhandler()-automation-mode>\\n621: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/servo--be6a2f99@dab40a01527870225a72e50a68411f7077f5cb2c/-/blob/components/script/dom/document.rs%3FL550-620\"}",

    "content": "550:     allow_declarative_shadow_roots: Cell<bool>,\n551:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-upgrade-insecure-requests/#insecure-requests-policy>\n552:     #[no_trace]\n553:     inherited_insecure_requests_policy: Cell<Option<InsecureRequestsPolicy>>,\n554:     //// <https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-mixed-content/#categorize-settings-object>\n555:     has_trustworthy_ancestor_origin: Cell<bool>,\n556:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/IntersectionObserver/#document-intersectionobservertaskqueued>\n557:     intersection_observer_task_queued: Cell<bool>,\n558:     /// Active intersection observers that should be processed by this document in\n559:     /// the update intersection observation steps.\n560:     /// <https://w3c.github.io/IntersectionObserver/#run-the-update-intersection-observations-steps>\n561:     /// > Let observer list be a list of all IntersectionObservers whose root is in the DOM tree of further at\n565:     /// <https://github.com/w3c/IntersectionObserver/issues/525>.\n566:     ///\n567:     /// The lifetime of an intersection observer is specified at\n568:     /// <https://github.com/w3c/IntersectionObserver/issues/525>.\n569:     intersection_observers: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<IntersectionObserver>>>,\n570:     /// The node that is currently highlighted by the devtools\n571:     highlighted_dom_node: MutNullableDom<Node>,\n572:     /// The constructed stylesheet that is adopted by this [Document].\n573:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-documentorshadowroot-adoptedstylesheets>\n574:     adopted_stylesheets: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<CSSStyleSheet>>>,\n575:     /// Cached frozen array of [`Self::adopted_stylesheets`]\n576:     #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"mozjs\"]\n577:     adopted_stylesheets_frozen_types: CachedFrozenArray,\n578:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom-view/#document-pending-scroll-event-targets>\n579:     pending_scroll_event_targets: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<EventTarget>>>,\n580:     /// Other reasons that a rendering update might be required for this [`Document`].\n581:     rendering_update_reasons: Cell<RenderingUpdateReason>,\n582:     /// Whether or not this [`Document`] is waiting on canvas image updates. scroll;\\n20:   }\\n21: \\n22:   #innerDiv {\\n23:     width: 400px;\\n24:     height: 400px;\\n25:   }\\n26: </style>\\n27: \\n28: <body style=\\\"margin:0\\\">\\n29:   <div id=\\\"targetDiv\\\">\\n30:     <!-- This test uses button elements as a consistent mechanism for\\n31:       ensuring that focus is on the correct scrolling element when\\n32:       scrolling via keys -->\\n33:     <button id=\\\"targetButton\\\">target</button>\\n34:     <div id=\\\"innerDiv\\\"></div>\\n35:   </div>\\n36:   <button id=\\\"docButton\\\">doc</button>\\n37:   <div id=\\\"spacer\\\"></div>\\n38: </body>\\n39: \\n40: <script>\\n41:   var target_div = document.getElementById('targetDiv');\\n42: \\n43:   async function resetScrollers(test) {\\n44:     await waitForScrollReset(test, target_div);\\n45:     await waitForScrollReset(test, document.scrollingElement);\\n46:   }\\n47: \\n48:   function getBoundingClientRect(element) {\\n49:     if (element == document) {\\n50:       return document.documentElement.getBoundingClientRect();\\n51:     }\\n52:     return element.getBoundingClientRect();\\n53:   }\\n54: \\n55:   async function upwardScroll(scrolling_element, button_element, scroll_type) {\\n56:     if (scroll_type == \\\"wheel\\\") {\\n57:       let x = 0;\\n58:       let y = 0;\\n59:       let delta_x = 0;\\n60:       let delta_y = -50;\\n61:       let actions = new test_driver.Actions()\\n62:         .scroll(x, y, delta_x, delta_y, {origin: scrolling_element});\\n63:       await actions.send();\\n64:     } else if (scroll_type == \\\"keys\\\") {\\n65:       const num_keydowns = 5;\\n66:       const arrowUp = '\\\\uE013';\\n67:       for (let i = 0; i < num_keydowns; i++) {\\n68:         await test_driver.send_keys(button_element, arrowUp);\\n69:       }\\n70:     }\\n71:   }\\n72: \\n73:   async function testScrollendNotFiredOnNoScroll(test, scrolling_element,\\n74:                                                  listening_element,\\n75:                                                  button_element, scroll_type) {\\n76:     test.add_cleanup(async () => {\\n77:       await resetScrollers(test);\\n78:       await waitForCompositorCommit();\\n79:     });\\n80: \\n81:     assert_greater_than(scrolling_element.scrollHeight,\\n82:                         scrolling_element.clientHeight);\\n83:     assert_equals(scrolling_element.scrollTop, 0);\\n84: \\n85:     let scrollend_promise = waitForScrollendEvent(test, listening_element).then(\\n86:       /* resolve */ test.unreached_func(\\\"no scroll, so no scrollend expected\\\"),\\n87:       /* reject */  () => { /* Did not see scrollend, which is okay. */ }\\n88:     );\\n89:     await upwardScroll(scrolling_element, button_element, scroll_type);\\n90:     await scrollend_promise;\\n91:   }\\n92: \\n93:   function runTest() {\\n94:     promise_test(async (t) => {\\n95:       await testScrollendNotFiredOnNoScroll(t, target_div, target_div,\\n96:                                             targetButton, \\\"wheel\\\");\\n97:     }, \\\"No scroll via wheel on div shouldn't fire scrollend.\\\");\\n98: \\n99:     promise_test(async (t) => {\\n100:       await testScrollendNotFiredOnNoScroll(t, target_div, target_div,\\n101:                                             targetButton, \\\"keys\\\");\\n102:     }, \\\"No scroll via keys on div shouldn't fire scrollend.\\\");\\n103: \\n104:     promise_test(async (t) => {\\n105:       await src=\"/resources/testdriver-vendor.js\"></script>\n8: <script src=\"scroll_support.js\"></script>\n9: <style>\n10:   #spacer {\n11:     height: 100vh;\n12:     width: 100px;\n13:     position: 400px;\n25:   }\n26: </style>\n27: \n28: <body style=\"margin:0\">\n29:   <div id=\"targetDiv\">\n30:     <!-- This test uses button elements as a consistent mechanism for\n31:       ensuring that focus is on the correct scrolling element when\n32:       scrolling via keys -->\n33:     <button id=\"targetButton\">target</button>\n34:     <div id=\"innerDiv\"></div>\n35:   </div>\n36:   <button id=\"docButton\">doc</button>\n37:   <div id=\"spacer\"></div>\n38: </body>\n39: \n40: <script>\n41:   var target_div = document.getElementById('targetDiv');\n42: \n43:   async function resetScrollers(test) {\n44:     await waitForScrollReset(test, target_div);\n45:     await waitForScrollReset(test, document.scrollingElement);\n46:   }\n47: \n48:   function getBoundingClientRect(element) {\n49:     if (element == document) {\n50:       return document.documentElement.getBoundingClientRect();\n51:     }\n52:     return element.getBoundingClientRect();\n53:   }\n54: \n55:   async function upwardScroll(scrolling_element, button_element, scroll_type) {\n56:     if (scroll_type == \"wheel\") {\n57:       let x = 0;\n58:       let y = 0;\n59:       let delta_x = 0;\n60:       let delta_y = -50;\n61:       let actions = new test_driver.Actions()\n62:         .scroll(x, y, delta_x, delta_y, {origin: scrolling_element});\n63:       await actions.send();\n64:     } else if (scroll_type == \"keys\") {\n65:       const num_keydowns = 5;\n66:       const arrowUp = '\\uE013';\n67:       for (let i = 0; i < num_keydowns; i++) {\n68:         await test_driver.send_keys(button_element, arrowUp);\n69:       }\n70:     }\n71:   }\n72: \n73:   async function testScrollendNotFiredOnNoScroll(test, scrolling_element,\n74:                                                  listening_element,\n75:                                                  button_element, scroll_type) {\n76:     test.add_cleanup(async () => {\n77:       await resetScrollers(test);\n78:       await waitForCompositorCommit();\n79:     });\n80: \n81:     assert_greater_than(scrolling_element.scrollHeight,\n82: listening_element).then(\n86:       /* resolve */ test.unreached_func(\"no scroll, so no scrollend expected\"),\n87:       /* reject */  () => { /* Did not see scrollend, which is okay. */ }\n88:     );\n89:     await upwardScroll(scrolling_element, button_element, scroll_type);\n90:     await scrollend_promise;\n91:   }\n92: \n93:   function runTest() {\n94:     promise_test(async (t) => {\n95:       await testScrollendNotFiredOnNoScroll(t, target_div, target_div,\n96:                                             targetButton, \"wheel\");\n97:     }, \"No scroll via wheel on div shouldn't fire scrollend.\");\n98: \n99:     promise_test(async (t) => {\n100:       await testScrollendNotFiredOnNoScroll(t, target_div, target_div,\n101:                                             targetButton, \"keys\");\n102:     }, \"No scroll via keys on div shouldn't fire scrollend.\");\n103: \n104:     promise_test(async (t) => {\n105:       await testScrollendNotFiredOnNoScroll(t, document.scrollingElement,\n106:                                             document, docButton, \"wheel\");\n107:     }, \"No scroll via wheel on document shouldn't fire scrollend.\");\n108: \n109: Input
{

Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"1688: \\n1689:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom-view/#document-run-the-scroll-steps>\\n1690:     pub(crate) fn run_the_scroll_steps(&self, can_gc: CanGc) {\\n1691:         // Step 1.\\n1692:         // > Run the steps to dispatch pending scrollsnapchanging events for doc.\\n1693:         // TODO(#7673): Implement scroll snapping\\n1694: \\n1695:         // Step 2\\n1696:         // > For each item target in doc\u2019s pending scroll event targets, in the order they\\n1697:         // > were added to the list, run these substeps:\\n1698:         // Step 3.\\n1699:         // > Empty doc\u2019s pending scroll event targets.\\n1700:         // Since the scroll event callback could trigger another scroll event, we are taking all of the\\n1701:         // current scroll event to avoid borrow checking error.\\n1702:         rooted_vec!(let notify_list <- self.pending_scroll_event_targets.take().into_iter());\\n1703:         for target in notify_list.iter() {\\n1704:             if target.downcast::<Document>().is_some() {\\n1705:                 // Step 2.1\\n1706:                 // > If target is a Document, fire an event named scroll that bubbles at target.\\n1707:                 target.fire_bubbling_event(Atom::from(\\\"scroll\\\"), can_gc);\\n1708:             } else if target.downcast::<Element>().is_some() {\\n1709: container, run the steps to update scrollsnapchanging targets\\n1726:         // > for doc with doc\u2019s eventual snap target in the block axis as newBlockTarget and\\n1727:         // > doc\u2019s eventual snap target in the inline axis as newInlineTarget.\\n1728:         // TODO(#7673): Implement scroll snapping\\n1729: \\n1730:         // Step 3.\\n1731:         // > If doc is already in     "content": "1688: \n1689:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom-view/#document-run-the-scroll-steps>\n1690:     pub(crate) fn run_the_scroll_steps(&self, can_gc: CanGc) {\n1691:         // Step 1.\n1692:         // > Run the steps to dispatch pending scrollsnapchanging events for doc.\n1693:         // TODO(#7673): Implement scroll snapping\n1694: \n1695:         // Step 2\n1696:         // > For each item target in doc\u2019s pending scroll event targets, in the order they\n1697:         // > were added to the list, run these substeps:\n1698:         // Step 3.\n1699:         // > Empty doc\u2019s pending scroll event targets.\n1700:         // Since the scroll event callback could trigger another scroll event, we are taking all of the\n1701:         // current scroll event to avoid borrow checking error.\n1702:         rooted_vec!(let notify_list <- self.pending_scroll_event_targets.take().into_iter());\n1703:         for target in notify_list.iter() {\n1704:             if target.downcast::<Document>().is_some() {\n1705:                 // Step 2.1\n1706:                 // > If target is a Document, fire an event named scroll that bubbles at target.\n1707:                 target.fire_bubbling_event(Atom::from(\"scroll\"), can_gc);\n1708:             } else if target.downcast::<Element>().is_some() {\n1709:                 // Step 2.2\n1710:                 // > Otherwise, fire an event named scroll at target.\n1711:                 target.fire_event(Atom::from(\"scroll\"), can_gc);\n1712:             }\n1713:         }\n1714: \n1715:         // Step 4.\n1716:         // > Run the steps to dispatch pending scrollsnapchange events for doc.\n1717:         // TODO(#7673): Implement scroll snapping\n1718:     }\n1719: \n1720:     /// Whenever a viewport gets scrolled (whether in response to user interaction or by an\n1721:     /// API), the user agent must run these steps:\n1722:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom-view/#scrolling-events>\n1723:     pub(crate) fn handle_viewport_scroll_event(&self) {\n1724:         // Step 2.\n1725:         // > If doc is a snap container, run the steps to update scrollsnapchanging targets\n1726:         // > for doc with doc\u2019s eventual snap target in the block axis as newBlockTarget and\n1727:         // > doc\u2019s eventual snap target in the inline axis as newInlineTarget.\n1728:         // TODO(#7673): Implement scroll snapping\n1729: \n1730:         // Step 3.\n1731:         // > If doc is already in doc\u2019s pending scroll event targets, abort these steps.\n1732:         let target = self.upcast::<EventTarget>();\n1733:         if self\n1734:             .pending_scroll_event_targets\n1735:             .borrow()\n1736:             .iter()\n1737:             .any(|other_target| *other_target == target)\n1738:         {\n1739:             return;\n1740:         }\n1741: \n1742:         // Step 4.\n1743:         // > Append doc to doc\u2019s pending scroll event targets.\n1744:         self.pending_scroll_event_targets\n1745:             .borrow_mut()\n1746:             .push(Dom::from_ref(target));\n1747:     }\n1748: \n1749:     /// Whenever an element gets scrolled (whether in response to user interaction or by an\n1750:     /// API), the user agent must run these steps:\n1751:     /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom-view/#scrolling-events>\n1752:     pub(crate) fn handle_element_scroll_event(&self, element: &Element) {\n1753:         // Step 2.\n1754:         // > If the element is a snap container, run the steps to update scrollsnapchanging\n1755:         // > targets for the element with the element\u2019s eventual snap target in the block\n1756:         // > axis as newBlockTarget and the element\u2019s eventual snap target in the inline axis\n1757:         // > as newInlineTarget.\n1758:         // TODO(#7673): Implement scroll snapping\n1759: \n1760:         // If it is\n    /// waiting it will not do any new layout until the canvas images are up-to-date in\n    /// the renderer.\n    waiting_on_canvas_image_updates: Cell<bool>,\n    /// The current rendering epoch, which is used to track updates in the renderer.\n    ///\n    ///   - Every display list update also advances the Epoch, so that the renderer knows\n    ///     when a particular display list is ready in order to take a screenshot.\n    ///   - Canvas image updates happen asynchronously and are tagged with this Epoch. crate::script_runtime::{CanGc, ScriptThreadEventCategory};\nuse crate::script_thread::ScriptThread;\nuse crate::stylesheet_set::StylesheetSetRef;\nuse crate::task::NonSendTaskBox;\nuse crate::task_source::TaskSourceName;\nuse crate::timers::OneshotTimerCallback;\nuse crate::xpath::parse_expression;\n\n#[derive(Clone, Copy, PartialEq)]\npub(crate) enum FireMouseEventType {\n    Move,\n    Over,\n    Out,\n    Enter,\n    Leave,\n}\n\nimpl FireMouseEventType {\n    pub(crate) fn as_str(&self) -> &str {\n        match *self {\n            FireMouseEventType::Move => \"mousemove\",\n            FireMouseEventType::Over => \"mouseover\",\n            FireMouseEventType::Out => \"mouseout\",\n            FireMouseEventType::Enter => \"mouseenter\",\n            FireMouseEventType::Leave => \"mouseleave\",\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(JSTraceable, MallocSizeOf)]\npub(crate) struct RefreshRedirectDue {\n    #[no_trace]\n    pub(crate) url: ServoUrl,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"non-owning\"]\n    pub(crate) window: DomRoot<Window>,\n}\nimpl RefreshRedirectDue {\n    /// Step 13 of <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#shared-declarative-refresh-steps>\n    pub(crate) fn invoke(self, can_gc: CanGc) {\n        // After the refresh has come due (as defined below),\n        // if the user has not canceled the redirect and, if meta is given,\n        // document's active sandboxing flag set does not have the sandboxed\n        // automatic features browsing context flag set,\n        // then navigate document's node navigable to urlRecord using document,\n        // with historyHandling set to \"replace\".\n        //\n        // TODO: check sandbox\n        // TODO: Check if meta was given\n        let load_data = self\n            .window\n            .load_data_for_document(self.url.clone(), self.window.pipeline_id());\n        self.window\n            .load_url(NavigationHistoryBehavior::Replace, false, load_data, can_gc);\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, JSTraceable, MallocSizeOf, PartialEq)]\npub(crate) enum IsHTMLDocument {\n    HTMLDocument,\n    NonHTMLDocument,\n}\n\n#[derive(JSTraceable, MallocSizeOf)]\n#[cfg_attr(crown, crown::unrooted_must_root_lint::must_root)]\nstruct FocusTransaction {\n    /// The focused element of this document.\n    element: Option<Dom<Element>>,\n    /// See [`Document::has_focus`].\n    has_focus: bool,\n    /// Focus options for the transaction\n    focus_options: FocusOptions,\n}\n\n/// Information about a declarative refresh\n#[derive(JSTraceable, MallocSizeOf)]\npub(crate) enum DeclarativeRefresh {\n    PendingLoad {\n        #[no_trace]\n        url: ServoUrl,\n        time: u64,\n    },\n    CreatedAfterLoad,\n}\n\n/// Reasons why a [`Document`] might need a rendering update that is otherwise\n/// untracked via other [`Document`] properties.\n#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Default, JSTraceable, MallocSizeOf)]\npub(crate) struct RenderingUpdateReason(u8);\n\nbitflags! {\n    impl RenderingUpdateReason: u8 {\n        /// When a `ResizeObserver` starts observing a target, this becomes true, which in turn is a\n        /// signal to the [`ScriptThread`] that a rendering update should happen.\n        const ResizeObserverStartedObservingTarget = 1 << 0;\n        /// When an `IntersectionObserver` starts observing a target, this becomes true, which in turn is a\n        /// signal to the [`ScriptThread`] that a rendering update should happen.\n        const IntersectionObserverStartedObservingTarget = 1 << 1;\n        /// All web fonts have loaded and `fonts.ready` promise has been fulfilled. We want to trigger\n        /// one more rendering update possibility after this happens, so that any potential screenshot\n        /// reflects the up-to-date contents.\n        const FontReadyPromiseFulfilled = 1 << 2;\n    }\n}\n\n/// <https://dom.spec.whatwg.org/#document>\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct Document {\n    node: Node,\n    document_or_shadow_root: DocumentOrShadowRoot,\n    window: Dom<Window>,\n    implementation: MutNullableDom<DOMImplementation>,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"type from external crate\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    content_type: Mime,\n    last_modified: Option<String>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    encoding: Cell<&'static Encoding>,\n    has_browsing_context: bool,\n    is_html_document: bool,\n    #[no_trace]\n    activity: Cell<DocumentActivity>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#the-document%27s-address>\n    #[no_trace]\n    url: DomRefCell<ServoUrl>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-about-base-url>\n    #[no_trace]\n    about_base_url: DomRefCell<Option<ServoUrl>>,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"defined in selectors\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    quirks_mode: Cell<QuirksMode>,\n    /// A helper used to process and store data related to input event handling.\n    event_handler: DocumentEventHandler,\n    /// A helper to handle showing and hiding user interface controls in the embedding layer.\n    embedder_controls: DocumentEmbedderControls,\n    /// Caches for the getElement methods. It is safe to use FxHash for these maps\n    /// as Atoms are `string_cache` items that will have the hash computed from a u32.\n    id_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, Vec<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n    name_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, Vec<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n    tag_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<LocalName, Dom<HTMLCollection>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n    tagns_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<QualName, Dom<HTMLCollection>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n    classes_map: DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Vec<Atom>, Dom<HTMLCollection>>>,\n    images: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n    embeds: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n    links: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n    forms: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n    scripts: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n    anchors: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n    applets: MutNullableDom<HTMLCollection>,\n    /// Information about the `<iframes>` in this [`Document`].\n    iframes: RefCell<IFrameCollection>,\n    /// Lock use for style attributes and author-origin stylesheet objects in this document.\n    /// Can be acquired once for accessing many objects.\n    #[no_trace]\n    style_shared_lock: StyleSharedRwLock,\n    /// List of stylesheets associated with nodes in this document. |None| if the list needs to be refreshed.\n    #[custom_trace]\n    stylesheets: DomRefCell<DocumentStylesheetSet<ServoStylesheetInDocument>>,\n    stylesheet_list: MutNullableDom<StyleSheetList>,\n    ready_state: Cell<DocumentReadyState>,\n    /// Whether the DOMContentLoaded event has already been dispatched.\n    domcontentloaded_dispatched: Cell<bool>,\n    /// The state of this document's focus transaction.\n    focus_transaction: DomRefCell<Option<FocusTransaction>>,\n    /// The element that currently has the document focus context.\n    focused: MutNullableDom<Element>,\n    /// The last sequence number sent to the constellation.\n    #[no_trace]\n    focus_sequence: Cell<FocusSequenceNumber>,\n    /// Indicates whether the container is included in the top-level browsing\n    /// context's focus chain (not considering system focus). Permanently `true`\n    /// for a top-level document.\n    has_focus: Cell<bool>,\n    /// The script element that is currently executing.\n    current_script: MutNullableDom<HTMLScriptElement>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#pending-parsing-blocking-script>\n    pending_parsing_blocking_script: DomRefCell<Option<PendingScript>>,\n    /// Number of stylesheets that block executing the next parser-inserted script\n    script_blocking_stylesheets_count: Cell<u32>,\n    /// Number of elements that block the rendering of the page.\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#implicitly-potentially-render-blocking>\n    render_blocking_element_count: Cell<u32>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-scripts-that-will-execute-when-the-document-has-finished-parsing>\n    deferred_scripts: PendingInOrderScriptVec,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-scripts-that-will-execute-in-order-as-soon-as-possible>\n    asap_in_order_scripts_list: PendingInOrderScriptVec,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#set-of-scripts-that-will-execute-as-soon-as-possible>\n    asap_scripts_set: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLScriptElement>>>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#animation-frame-callback-identifier>\n    /// Current identifier of animation frame callback\n    animation_frame_ident: Cell<u32>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#list-of-animation-frame-callbacks>\n    /// List of animation frame callbacks\n    animation_frame_list: DomRefCell<VecDeque<(u32, Option<AnimationFrameCallback>)>>,\n    /// Whether we're in the process of running animation callbacks.\n    ///\n    /// Tracking this is not necessary for correctness. Instead, it is an optimization to avoid\n    /// sending needless `ChangeRunningAnimationsState` messages to `Paint`.\n    running_animation_callbacks: Cell<bool>,\n    /// Tracks all outstanding loads related to this document.\n    loader: DomRefCell<DocumentLoader>,\n    /// The current active HTML parser, to allow resuming after interruptions.\n    current_parser: MutNullableDom<ServoParser>,\n    /// The cached first `base` element with an `href` attribute.\n    base_element: MutNullableDom<HTMLBaseElement>,\n    /// This field is set to the document itself for inert documents.\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#appropriate-template-contents-owner-document>\n    appropriate_template_contents_owner_document: MutNullableDom<Document>,\n    /// Information on elements needing restyle to ship over to layout when the\n    /// time comes.\n    pending_restyles: DomRefCell<FxHashMap<Dom<Element>, NoTrace<PendingRestyle>>>,\n    /// A collection of reasons that the [`Document`] needs to be restyled at the next\n    /// opportunity for a reflow. If this is empty, then the [`Document`] does not need to\n    /// be restyled.\n    #[no_trace]\n    needs_restyle: Cell<RestyleReason>,\n    /// Navigation Timing properties:\n    /// <https://w3c.github.io/navigation-timing/#sec-PerformanceNavigationTiming>\n    #[no_trace]\n    dom_interactive: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    dom_content_loaded_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    dom_content_loaded_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    dom_complete: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    top_level_dom_complete: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    load_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    load_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    unload_event_start: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    unload_event_end: Cell<Option<CrossProcessInstant>>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-https-state>\n    #[no_trace]\n    https_state: Cell<HttpsState>,\n    /// The document's origin.\n    #[no_trace]\n    origin: MutableOrigin,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#dom-document-referrer>\n    referrer: Option<String>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#target-element>\n    target_element: MutNullableDom<Element>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#concept-document-policy-container>\n    #[no_trace]\n    policy_container: DomRefCell<PolicyContainer>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#map-of-preloaded-resources>\n    #[no_trace]\n    preloaded_resources: DomRefCell<PreloadedResources>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#ignore-destructive-writes-counter>\n    ignore_destructive_writes_counter: Cell<u32>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#ignore-opens-during-unload-counter>\n    ignore_opens_during_unload_counter: Cell<u32>,\n    /// The number of spurious `requestAnimationFrame()` requests we've received.\n    ///\n    /// A rAF request is considered spurious if nothing was actually reflowed.\n    spurious_animation_frames: Cell<u8>,\n\n    /// Track the total number of elements in this DOM's tree.\n    /// This is sent to layout every time a reflow is done;\n    /// layout uses this to determine if the gains from parallel layout will be worth the overhead.\n    ///\n    /// See also: <https://github.com/servo/servo/issues/10110>\n    dom_count: Cell<u32>,\n    /// Entry node for fullscreen.\n    fullscreen_element: MutNullableDom<Element>,\n    /// Map from ID to set of form control elements that have that ID as\n    /// their 'form' content attribute. Used to reset form controls\n    /// whenever any element with the same ID as the form attribute\n    /// is inserted or removed from the document.\n    /// See <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#form-owner>\n    /// It is safe to use FxBuildHasher here as Atoms are in the string_cache\n    form_id_listener_map:\n        DomRefCell<HashMapTracedValues<Atom, HashSet<Dom<Element>>, FxBuildHasher>>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    interactive_time: DomRefCell<ProgressiveWebMetrics>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    tti_window: DomRefCell<InteractiveWindow>,\n    /// RAII canceller for Fetch\n    canceller: FetchCanceller,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#throw-on-dynamic-markup-insertion-counter>\n    throw_on_dynamic_markup_insertion_counter: Cell<u64>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#page-showing>\n    page_showing: Cell<bool>,\n    /// Whether the document is salvageable.\n    salvageable: Cell<bool>,\n    /// Whether the document was aborted with an active parser\n    active_parser_was_aborted: Cell<bool>,\n    /// Whether the unload event has already been fired.\n    fired_unload: Cell<bool>,\n    /// List of responsive images\n    responsive_images: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLImageElement>>>,\n    /// Number of redirects for the document load\n    redirect_count: Cell<u16>,\n    /// Number of outstanding requests to prevent JS or layout from running.\n    script_and_layout_blockers: Cell<u32>,\n    /// List of tasks to execute as soon as last script/layout blocker is removed.\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Measuring trait objects is hard\"]\n    delayed_tasks: DomRefCell<Vec<Box<dyn NonSendTaskBox>>>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#completely-loaded>\n    completely_loaded: Cell<bool>,\n    /// Set of shadow roots connected to the document tree.\n    shadow_roots: DomRefCell<HashSet<Dom<ShadowRoot>>>,\n    /// Whether any of the shadow roots need the stylesheets flushed.\n    shadow_roots_styles_changed: Cell<bool>,\n    /// List of registered media controls.\n    /// We need to keep this list to allow the media controls to\n    /// access the \"privileged\" document.servoGetMediaControls(id) API,\n    /// where `id` needs to match any of the registered ShadowRoots\n    /// hosting the media controls UI.\n    media_controls: DomRefCell<HashMap<String, Dom<ShadowRoot>>>,\n    /// A set of dirty HTML canvas elements that need their WebRender images updated the\n    /// next time the rendering is updated.\n    dirty_canvases: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<HTMLCanvasElement>>>,\n    /// Whether or not animated images need to have their contents updated.\n    has_pending_animated_image_update: Cell<bool>,\n    /// <https://w3c.github.io/slection-api/#dfn-selection>\n    selection: MutNullableDom<Selection>,\n    /// A timeline for animations which is used for synchronizing animations.\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/web-animations/#timeline>\n    animation_timeline: DomRefCell<AnimationTimeline>,\n    /// Animations for this Document\n    animations: Animations,\n    /// Image Animation Manager for this Document\n    image_animation_manager: DomRefCell<ImageAnimationManager>,\n    /// The nearest inclusive ancestors to all the nodes that require a restyle.\n    dirty_root: MutNullableDom<Element>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#will-declaratively-refresh>\n    declarative_refresh: DomRefCell<Option<DeclarativeRefresh>>,\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/resize-observer/#dom-document-resizeobservers-slot>\n    ///\n    /// Note: we are storing, but never removing, resize observers.\n    /// The lifetime of resize observers is specified at\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/resize-observer/#lifetime>.\n    /// But implementing it comes with known problems:\n    /// - <https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1596992>\n    /// - <https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/4518>\n    resize_observers: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<ResizeObserver>>>,\n    /// The set of all fonts loaded by this document.\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-font-loading/#font-face-source>\n    fonts: MutNullableDom<FontFaceSet>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#visibility-state>\n    visibility_state: Cell<DocumentVisibilityState>,\n    /// <https://www.iana.org/assignments/http-status-codes/http-status-codes.xhtml>\n    status_code: Option<u16>,\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#is-initial-about:blank>\n    is_initial_about_blank: Cell<bool>,\n    /// <https://dom.spec.whatwg.org/#document-allow-declarative-shadow-roots>\n    allow_declarative_shadow_roots: Cell<bool>,\n    /// <https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-upgrade-insecure-requests/#insecure-requests-policy>\n    #[no_trace]\n    inherited_insecure_requests_policy: Cell<Option<InsecureRequestsPolicy>>,\n    //// <https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-mixed-content/#categorize-settings-object>\n    has_trustworthy_ancestor_origin: Cell<bool>,\n    /// <https://w3c.github.io/IntersectionObserver/#document-intersectionobservertaskqueued>\n    intersection_observer_task_queued: Cell<bool>,\n    /// Active intersection observers that should be processed by this document in\n    /// the update intersection observation steps.\n    /// <https://w3c.github.io/IntersectionObserver/#run-the-update-intersection-observations-steps>\n    /// > Let observer list be a list of all IntersectionObservers whose root is in the DOM tree of document.\n    /// > For the top-level browsing context, this includes implicit root observers.\n    ///\n    /// Details of which document that should process an observers is discussed further at\n    /// <https://github.com/w3c/IntersectionObserver/issues/525>.\n    ///\n    /// The lifetime of an intersection observer is specified at\n    /// <https://github.com/w3c/IntersectionObserver/issues/525>.\n    intersection_observers: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<IntersectionObserver>>>,\n    /// The node that is currently highlighted by the devtools\n    highlighted_dom_node: MutNullableDom<Node>,\n    /// The constructed stylesheet that is adopted by this [Document].\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-documentorshadowroot-adoptedstylesheets>\n    adopted_stylesheets: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<CSSStyleSheet>>>,\n    /// Cached frozen array of [`Self::adopted_stylesheets`]\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"mozjs\"]\n    adopted_stylesheets_frozen_types: CachedFrozenArray,\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom-view/#document-pending-scroll-event-targets>\n    pending_scroll_event_targets: DomRefCell<Vec<Dom<EventTarget>>>,\n    /// Other reasons that a rendering update might be required for this [`Document`].\n    rendering_update_reasons: Cell<RenderingUpdateReason>,\n    /// Whether or not this [`Document`] is waiting on canvas image updates. If it is\n    /// waiting it will not do any new layout until the canvas images are up-to-date in\n    /// the renderer.\n    waiting_on_canvas_image_updates: Cell<bool>,\n    /// The current rendering epoch, which is used to track updates in the renderer.\n    ///\n    ///   - Every display list update also advances the Epoch, so that the renderer knows\n    ///     when a particular display list is ready in order to take a screenshot.\n    ///   - Canvas image updates happen asynchronously and are tagged with this Epoch. Until\n    ///     those asynchronous updates are complete, the `Document` will not perform any\n    ///     more rendering updates.\n    #[no_trace]\n    current_rendering_epoch: Cell<Epoch>,\n    /// The global custom element reaction stack for this script thread.\n    #[conditional_malloc_size_of]\n    custom_element_reaction_stack: Rc<CustomElementReactionStack>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#active-sandboxing-flag-set>,\n    active_sandboxing_flag_set: Cell<SandboxingFlagSet>,\n    #[no_trace]\n    /// The [`SandboxingFlagSet`] use to create the browsing context for this [`Document`].\n    /// These are cached here as they cannot always be retrieved readily if the owner of\n    /// browsing context (either `<iframe>` or popup) might be in a different `ScriptThread`.\n    ///\n    /// See\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#determining-the-creation-sandboxing-flags>.\n    creation_sandboxing_flag_set: Cell<SandboxingFlagSet>,\n    /// The cached favicon for that document.\n    #[no_trace]\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"TODO: unimplemented on Image\"]\n    favicon: RefCell<Option<Image>>,\n\n    /// All websockets created that are associated with this document.\n    websockets: DOMTracker<WebSocket>,\n\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#details-name-group>\n    details_name_groups: DomRefCell<Option<DetailsNameGroups>>,\n\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#registerprotocolhandler()-automation-mode>\n    #[no_trace]\n    protocol_handler_automation_mode: RefCell<CustomHandlersAutomationMode>,\n\n    /// Reflect the value of that preferences to prevent paying the cost of a RwLock access.\n    layout_animations_test_enabled: bool,\n}\n\nimpl Document {\n    /// <https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/#unloading-document-cleanup-steps>\n    fn unloading_cleanup_steps(&self) {\n        // Step 1. Let window be document's relevant global object.\n        // Step 2. For each WebSocket object webSocket whose relevant global object is window, make disappear webSocket.\n        if self.close_outstanding_websockets() {\n            // If this affected any WebSocket objects, then make document unsalvageable given document and \"websocket\".\n            self.salvageable.set(false);\n        }\n\n        // Step 3. For each WebTransport object transport whose relevant global object is window, run the context cleanup steps given transport.\n        // TODO\n\n        // Step 4.
